name: Geomeun Samwol
description: Black March is a B-rank Needle and Ignition Weapon lent to Baam for a short time by Yuri Jahad. Black March is one of the 13 Month Series made by the craftsmaster, Ashul Edwaru. The weapon is sentient and has a spirit inside it and when ignited, it is capable of unleashing extreme power like the other 13 Month Series.
